subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved maidservant of God! What thou hast written was considered. It indicated purity of heart and advancement toward God.
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
